steps.title: Read center and radius
steps.content:
The circle equation is:
$$
(x+4)^2+(y-15)^2=144
$$
So the center is $(-4,15)$ and the radius is:
$$
\sqrt{144}=12
$$

steps.title: Find possible x-values
steps.content:
The $x$-coordinate of a point on the circle must be within $12$ units of $-4$:
$$
-4-12 \le a \le -4+12
$$
$$
-16 \le a \le 8
$$

steps.title: Choose a value in range
steps.content: Among the choices, $-10$ is in the interval from $-16$ to $8$. The answer is B.
